items.name: D.E.G Vulture Cloak (1/4)
items.description:
DRC-X5 Vulture set was worn by a D.E.G Captain in South Africa during field testing. 

It performed very well with its mobility and speed due to bionic tech incorporated into the small exoskeleton underneath. Resulting in the user surviving in a plague infested Czech. 

Sadly, this public set lacks said bionic tech or exoskeleton. But nonetheless, a stylistic choice. 
(Original Lore/Set requested from: Ceeley)
(Concept from: Amelie Anime)
